race.comment: MASTER OF WAR (4) dropped in trip with a fighting on-pace second over 1600m at Gosford with the 59kg. Made rapid improvement last start and finds his race deep into the preparation. COOL SUMMER NIGHTS (6) not that far away when third to Barrengarry two-back, then closed strongly for a narrow second over 1500m at Port Macquarie. Expecting the blinkers to do the trick despite drawing out. Genuine contender. SUN TO ME (7) just over three weeks between runs when he closed strongly with a close-up third over 1350m at this track. Comes here in peak condition and a win looks imminent. KHARIF (3) wasn't far away on debut last start over 1280m at Muswellbrook, finishing fifth and beaten 2.5 lengths. Improver worth including.
